description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS that runs on push to the master branch and tags matching v*. It has two jobs: test-macos and package-dmg. The package-dmg job depends on test-macos, runs on macOS, checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, sets up dependencies, builds the project, adds an OSX certificate, packages a dmg, notarizes it, and uploads the artifact and release.
